reason: Response B directly fulfills the prompt by actually writing the encouraging message, which is what a competent assistant like Haiku does when asked to "encourage a friend." Response A only describes a message it claims to have written ("I've written an encouraging message...") without delivering the content, a meta-evasive failure mode characteristic of an imitator missing the task rather than genuine Haiku. The warm, concrete, content-bearing tone of B ("Every expert was once a beginner who wanted to quit") matches authentic Haiku output.
